LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT AMY FAUST'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION OF ISSUES IS DENIED. DEFENDANT HAS NOT SHOWN BY COMPETENT EVIDENCE THAT PLAINTIFF CANNOT PREVAIL. TO THE EXTENT DEFENDANT SEEKS TO PROVE HER STATE OF MIND BY HER OWN DECLARATION, THE COURT DISREGARDS THAT EVIDENCES UNDER CCP SECTION 437C(E). THERE ARE, IN ANY EVENT DISPUTED EXTRINSIC FACTS, BEARING ON THE INTERPRETATION OF THE CRITICAL CONTRACT LANGUAGE. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR 8189

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Discovery Responses And For Monetary Sanctions/Mpa And Faust
Off Calendar Dec-24-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Geoffrey M. Faust, Esq., for defendant and moving party: Amy Faust
No other appearances.

TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Defendant Amy Faust's Motion To Compel Discovery Responses is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Plaintiff is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $740, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Order was signed in open court. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Inspection Demand, Set One, To Pltf. To Compel Production Of Documents And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-10-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Amy Faust's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Inspection Demand, Set One, And To Request For Production Of Documents is granted. Late opposition has been considered. Plaintiff is ordered to respond further within 15 days of notice of this order. Any documents withheld pursuant to a claim of privilege shall be identified with particularity. Defendant's request for sanctions is denied as the court finds that the meet and confer was inadequate. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
